reasoning.evidence: No mention of Nablarchバッチ, BatchAction, DataReader, 都度起動, or 常駐型. Content is entirely focused on HTTP request dispatching for web.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, jBatch, Batchlet, Chunk, or javax.batch.

No mention of JAX-RS, REST API, @Produces, @Consumes, or JaxRsMethodBinder. The handler maps URLs to action class methods using HTTP methods (get/post) but this is a web application dispatch mechanism, not a RESTful web service handler.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler.

The content is explicitly about a web handler (nablarch-fw-web module, class nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpRequestJavaPackageMapping). It describes URL dispatching to action classes via a handler queue, using HTTP methods (get/post), context root paths, and references router_adaptor — all core web application concepts.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー (message queue), 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader.
